title: Minimum Replacements To Sort The Array
description: An operation replaces one positive integer by two positive integers with the same sum. Return the minimum operations needed to make nums nondecreasing. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: nums: list[int]. 1 <= len(nums) <=100000; positive values <=1e9; replacement parts must be positive integers.
output_contract: Return long using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
